name: Nmap (Portable Build)
categoryDescription: Commonly abused tools that leave NO Windows registry artifacts. These tools are typically single executables, portable builds, or in-memory frameworks. Detection depends entirely on non-registry evidence: process execution logs, prefetch, ShimCache/Amcache, BAM/DAM, network traffic, and memory forensics. Includes detection notes for each tool.
description: Network scanner. Portable/extracted build leaves no registry. Installer version writes to HKLM\SOFTWARE\Nmap. Single portable build is common in attacker toolkits.
forensic_value: No registry artifacts. Distinguish from legitimate admin use by context: who ran it, from where, at what time, targeting what subnets. INSTALLER version DOES write registry — portable does not.
